chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِلْحَاحِ فِي الدُّعَاءِ وَ التَّلَبُّثِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – Insistence during the supplication and the awaiting (for the Answering)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/31)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/31)
text: لَا وَ اللَّهِ لَا يُلِحُّ عَبْدٌ عَلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَّا اسْتَجَابَ اللَّهُ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Husayn Al Ahmasy, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘No, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! No servant (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>) would insist upon Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic except Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Answer for him’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Husayn al-Ahmasi from a man from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘By Allah, if a man insists before Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, on praying and pleading for help. He will accept his prayers.’”
